name: Richard Teitelbaum
abstract: Richard Lowe Teitelbaum (May 19, 1939 – April 9, 2020) was an American composer, keyboardist, and improvisor. A student of Allen Forte, Mel Powell, and Luigi Nono, he was known for his live electronic music and synthesizer performances.

concerts.label: Creative Music Studio: Music of Frederic Rzewski

works.t: Variations on No Place to Go but Around

about_quotes.speaker: Marilyn Crispell
about_quotes.evidence: I’ll usually hire somebody like David Rothenberg or Richard Teitelbaum who plays synthesizer or laptop electronics and tell them what kinds of sounds I want
about_quotes.doc_title: Marilyn Crispell interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 21, 2022
